boundary: This packet tracks the two spatial prepared-summary apps. Service coverage now has a reviewed RTX artifact for its bounded gap-summary path; event hotspot now has a reviewed RTX artifact and same-scale Embree baseline parity for its bounded count-summary path. The packet does not authorize a public RTX speedup claim.
